text: - 1.2 COMPETENT PERSON: As set forth in Section 10.5 of the Subcontract Agreement and Section 7 of the GS Construction Mountain, LLC Project Manual, Subcontractor shall designate a 'competent person' to represent it at all project meetings, which designation will be in writing and kept on file in the Contractor trailer. The person designated must be on the Project Site at all times that Subcontractor is performing the work.
